auth_mode.title: Authentication Method
auth_mode.description: How to authenticate with AWS. Defaults to Access Key and Secret

aws_access_key_id.title: AWS Access Key ID
aws_access_key_id.description: Access Key ID with read/write access to a bucket.

external_id.title: External ID
external_id.description: External ID for the IAM role

enable_event_notifications.title: Enable event notifications
enable_event_notifications.description: Enable S3 event notifications for incremental sync

event_queue_arn.title: Event Queue ARN
event_queue_arn.description: ARN of the SQS queue receiving S3 event notifications

csv_has_headers.title: CSV files have headers
csv_has_headers.description: Whether CSV files have a header row with field names.

is_single_table.title: Files are time-based snapshots
is_single_table.description: Treat the files as a single table.

single_table_file_formats.title: File formats
single_table_file_formats.description: File formats that may be present across different tables

skip_lines.title: Skip first lines
skip_lines.description: Skip first N lines of each CSV file.
